n: A Blade of Flame and Fury, Part 1

steps.t: Meet with Mizâdi outside the gates of Kûr Anzar to begin the assault.
Make your way through Kûr Anzar, tearing down Barkhûshim banners and replacing them with banners for Renewed Hamât. Defeat All-seeing cultists through…
Make your way to Mizâdi near the tower of Kûr Anzar.
Speak with Mizâdi outside the tower of Kûr Anzar.
